notes: v0.16.38 — PEAK = most kills in a single calendar day + now-playing track HUD. Profile + STATS PEAK chip is now 'PEAK / DAY' and tracks the all-time best day's total kills (rolls over at local midnight). Practice doesn't count. New now-playing label in the top-right music HUD during a match — shows current track name (e.g. ♪  AUDIO 5) below the BPM / sync line. Windows only.
